epigraph.quote: We had a drink in the bar (Wi-Fi) for waiting for Charles to ring, but he didn't.

per_stop.quote: We had a good supper at the Plough in our usual Kent campsite
had lunch at the Brasserie overlooking the weir. A boat went down the lock.
5 villages make up a ski resort lovely small valley.
For 30 min we came downhill with both brakes on squeaking all the way down.
Glaciers. Through the Susten pass. Mad motorcyclists.
south through the St. Gotthard Tunnel. 17R long.
They don't have the parts that broke. (probably sold out to other people with busted awnings)
We passed poplar plantations and rice paddy fields.
It still has 6 monks. Beautiful carvings, inlays, frescoes.
a lovely rural campsite downhill from the village
